narrowIdea: Hand the wheel to the audience — two concrete paths.

content.title: Where do we go from here?

layoutSlots.title: I want to be upfront — this part of the session is yours to steer.
layoutSlots.body: I have a plan, but if you have an idea you want to explore live — let's do that instead.

layoutSlots.title: Your idea
layoutSlots.body: Bring something — we'll build it together.

notes: Pause. Read the chat. Whichever path the room picks, the next 20 minutes bend to it.
